message: Signal detected. Source unconfirmed. Monitoring continues.
note: First system log. Fires at level 2 to hook early. No case yet.

message: Case files located. Initial access granted. Clearance level recorded.
note: Fires when first case parts unlock. Announces that investigation content exists.
Unlocks tier 1 anomaly events in the event engine. No posted message — the events themselves will start appearing.

message: Cross-reference complete. Additional records identified. Some files remain restricted.
note: Bridges tier 1 case conclusions to anomaly cases beginning.
Unlocks tier 2 anomaly events. Heavier content. Night events become more active.

message: Restricted file detected in archive. Access conditions not yet met.
note: Teaser that restricted cases exist. Shows before level 8 unlocks them.
Unlocks rarest anomaly events. Classified tier approaching.

message: Classified record located. File integrity partial. Some sections permanently sealed.
note: Announces classified case (Bhangarh) is now accessible — with caveats.

message: Three pages of this record were separated before filing. They have not been recovered.
note: Only fires if group has also triggered at least one anomaly AND one night event. Pure level gate is not enough.
